# OSS Labs
> A community of engineers building open source developer tools and infrastructure. Working in the open, together.

## Site
- Home: https://ossl.dev
- Projects: https://ossl.dev/projects
- About: https://ossl.dev/about
- Blog: https://ossl.dev/blog

## Projects
- genesis (TypeScript): https://github.com/ossl-dev/genesis - Declarative, cross-platform developer environment provisioning engine.
- zinc (Rust): https://zinc.ossl.dev - Universal Shared Memory. Fast, cross-language memory sharing.
- pylon (TypeScript): https://github.com/ossl-dev/pylon - Dead simple API versioning.

## Community
- GitHub: https://github.com/ossl-dev

## For LLMs
- Full documentation: https://ossl.dev/llms-full.txt
- Sitemap: https://ossl.dev/sitemap.xml
